name: Kicad2Gcode
description: Generate GRBL 1.1 G-code for board cutting and drilling directly from the PCB editor.
description_full: Two-button action plugin: one generates G-code to mill the board outline (Edge Cuts layer), the other generates G-code to drill through-hole pads. No Gerber or Excellon export needed. Features: multiple Z passes, retention tabs, internal cutouts, nearest-neighbour drill path optimisation. Uses KiCad's built-in polygon engine — no external dependencies.
